headline: Costco quietly makes a key credit card change
summary: Costco treats credit cards differently from pretty much any other major retailer. Instead of taking any credit card and offering its own branded card with bonus perks, the chain has an exclusive credit card partner. For a long time, the warehouse club worked exclusively with American Express and ...

headline: This is why Citi Cut Strategy Inc. (MSTR) Price Target But Asserted Buy Rating
summary: Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR) is one of the best beaten-down technology stocks to buy now. On July 1, Citi cut its price target of Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR) to $136 from $260 while reiterating a Buy rating. Despite the cut, the new price target represents significant upside potential as the stock is trading at about $93 a […]

headline: Interview: Citi’s Andrew James on private markets, portfolio resilience and long-term wealth creation
summary: In an interview with Kuldeep Jha, Andrew James, the head of Citi Global Wealth at Work International shares insights on capital preservation strategies to hedge against geopolitical uncertainty and outlines the asset classes poised to benefit from the AI boom.

headline: Citi advised StepStone Group on landmark $3.3 billion Structured Solutions Vehicle
summary: LONDON, July 08, 2026--Citi has advised StepStone Group, a leading global private markets investment firm, on the structuring and placement of the largest structured solutions vehicle of its kind to date, resulting in $3.3 billion in commitments to invest predominantly in private market secondaries.

headline: Citigroup (C) Heads Into Q2 Earnings With Fair Value In Focus
summary: Citigroup stock moves into Q2 earnings with sentiment in focus Citigroup (C) heads into its July 14 Q2 earnings release with investors already tuned in to higher analyst expectations for earnings and revenue compared with the same quarter last year. The stock has gained 6.3% over the past month and 14.0% over the past 3 months, while its 1 year total return stands at 68.2%. Those figures, alongside upward estimate revisions and sector optimism around loan growth, net interest margins and...
